scripts.codecharta:gitlog: git log --numstat --topo-order --raw --encoding=utf-8 --diff-filter=ACDMRTUXB > gitlog.txt && git ls-files > repo-files.txt && node -e "" | ccsh gitlogparser log-scan -nc --git-log gitlog.txt --repo-files repo-files.txt -o gitlog.cc.json
scripts.codecharta:analyze: pnpm codecharta:gitlog && node -e "" | ccsh rawtextparser -nc -e "node_modules,.next,dist,.turbo,coverage,gitlog.txt,repo-files.txt,rawtext.cc.json,gitlog.cc.json,vantrade.cc.json" -o rawtext.cc.json . && node -e "" | ccsh merge -nc rawtext.cc.json gitlog.cc.json -o vantrade.cc.json
